subject: fix(pwa): fix update notification re-appearing on every navigation
body:
Move update detection state from React component scope to module-level
singleton. Previously, each remount of home.tsx called register() which
re-triggered server checks and updatefound events, causing the "Update
Available" banner to reappear after every navigation.

Key changes:
- register() → getRegistration() to avoid re-triggering server checks
- Module-level state persists across component mounts/unmounts
- wasJustUpdated() sessionStorage guard for post-update reload edge case
- Proper detection of existing waiting/installing workers on init

Tags: pwa, bugfix, service-worker, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
